question.label: Mentoring stall
question.name: You said mentoring 'stopped pushing' — what made it stall?
question.description: Drills into the stalled mentoring thread to surface whether the block is time, scope, opportunity, or motivation.

answer: I am not sure what I am owning next quarter yet, and that makes me uneasy.

assessment.note: Uncertainty about next-quarter ownership is presented as the reason mentoring stalled, signaling both blocked growth and low role clarity.

new_queue.label: Next quarter ownership
new_queue.name: You said 'owning next quarter' feels unclear — what's most uncertain there?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel lighter or sharper?

history.answer_excerpt: The launch went well, but this week I feel flatter than I expected.
Mostly cleanup and reviews right now, not much that feels new.
I am proud of the migration plan and how we handled the cutover.
I did mention mentoring before. I still want it, but I stopped pushing.
I am not sure what I am owning next quarter yet, and that makes me uneasy.
I am not sure what I am owning next quarter yet, and that makes me uneasy.
